businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader, operating across Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue exceeded $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). Pentagon adopted Maven AI as official program of record for military-wide deployment. Selected for Golden Dome $185B missile defense software. CNBC reports Palantir tools are already in active use in the Iran war. FY2026 guidance: $7.19B-$7.41B revenue (+60-65%).
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - Large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - Generative AI integration platform
AIP Boot Camps - Rapid customer onboarding programs

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: S&P 500 IT sector avg 34x = 7.4x premium. Motley Fool says earnings must grow 5x to bring P/E to 50x

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E EPS $1.22. Still 3x growth stock avg 30-40x

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: From FY2025 $4.48B to FY2026E $7.40B. Iran war expansion could further accelerate defense AI demand

keyMetrics.name: P/S Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Software sector avg 10-15x = 5-7x premium. Still deep in overvaluation territory relative to growth

keyMetrics.name: Market Cap
keyMetrics.interpretation: -31% from 52-week high $207. Despite defense tailwinds, tech selloff pressure dominates

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. Room before oversold but weak bounce momentum in downtrend

growthDrivers.title: CNBC: 'Iran War Is Defense Tech's Chance to Shine, Palantir Already in Use' (3/28)
growthDrivers.description: CNBC reports Palantir has secured multi-billion-dollar Pentagon contracts and CEO Karp confirmed tools are being used in active operations. Houthi entry expands the war and demand

growthDrivers.title: Motley Fool: 'Palantir Blockbuster Week' with 3 Key Developments (3/29)
growthDrivers.description: Golden Dome, Maven adoption, Polymarket partnership named 'blockbuster week's 3 highlights.' Fundamental strength continues

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B Missile Defense Software Selection (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Palantir and Anduril co-developing software for Trump administration's $185B missile shield. Houthi missile attacks make missile defense urgency even more acute

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket AI Anti-Fraud Partnership (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Vergence AI handles real-time trade surveillance and user behavior monitoring for Polymarket. Starting point for financial services expansion

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Official Program of Record for All US Military (3/23)
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as official program of record. Long-term deployment across all military branches confirmed. Battle-tested in Iran conflict

growthDrivers.title: Czech National Bank Purchases PLTR (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Czech central bank acquired 24,730 shares. A central bank buying defense AI stock is a powerful institutional confidence signal

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, top-level security clearances, Maven military-wide adoption, Iran war battle validation. Moats money cannot buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs are prohibitively high
Top-tier security clearances and 20+ year government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to replicate
Real-time targeting use in Iran war. Houthi entry expands the operational theater and demand
AIP Boot Camps drive rapid customer acquisition. Ontology data model ecosystem expanding

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Collaborating with Palantir on Golden Dome. $60B valuation

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platforms. Significantly behind on government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Cannot match Ontology integration depth

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Far behind in both revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.headline: Houthis Fire Missiles at Israel, Iran War Expands. Defense AI Demand Set to Rise
recentNews.significance: New war front opened. Per CNBC, Palantir tools already in active use. War expansion increases defense AI demand. Golden Dome missile defense urgency heightened by Houthi attacks

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: 'Palantir Blockbuster Week, 3 Things Shareholders Need to Know'
recentNews.significance: Golden Dome, Maven, Polymarket named 'blockbuster' developments. Same outlet also published '5 years from now, same price' bear case

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: 'PLTR Stock Price in 2030 Will Be About the Same'
recentNews.significance: P/E 250x requires +489% earnings growth to reach 50x. Even at +65% annual growth, valuation normalization takes 5 years

recentNews.headline: Spire Wealth Management Adds 5,439 PLTR Shares
recentNews.significance: Spire increased PLTR position by 6.8% in Q4. Institutional buying continues

recentNews.headline: Polymarket Vergence AI Anti-Fraud Partnership
recentNews.significance: Real-time trade surveillance for prediction markets. Entry point for broader financial services AI expansion

analystOpinions.notableComment: Iran war expansion strengthens defense demand thesis. CNBC calls it 'defense tech's chance.' But P/E 250x remains the valuation barrier. Motley Fool published both 'blockbuster' and '5-year same price' takes

risks.title: Extreme Valuation, '5 Years Same Price' Bear Case
risks.description: P/E 250x (7.4x IT sector avg). Motley Fool: earnings must grow 489% to bring P/E to 50x. Even with +65% annual revenue growth, normalization takes 5 years. War upside already priced in

risks.title: Oil at $100, Macro Tech Selloff
risks.description: Houthi entry, oil $100+, inflation reignition. Despite defense tailwinds, high-multiple tech selloff pressure dominates at P/S 76x

risks.title: Below Both 50-Day and 200-Day Moving Averages
risks.description: Below SMA50 ($149) and SMA200 ($169). Three consecutive daily declines, weekly -5.1%. $126 support is next

risks.title: Analyst Opinion Split
risks.description: 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Market skepticism on valuation persists

risks.title: Stock-Based Compensation Dilution
risks.description: Share count growing 4.67% annually. Ongoing SBC dilutes existing shareholder value

buyReasons.title: Iran War Expansion: Direct Defense AI Beneficiary
buyReasons.rationale: CNBC confirms Palantir tools in active wartime use. Houthi entry expands operations. Golden Dome missile defense urgency heightened. Defense AI demand structurally increasing

buyReasons.title: Blockbuster Week: Golden Dome + Maven + Polymarket
buyReasons.rationale: Golden Dome $185B (Phase 1 'many billions'), Maven military-wide adoption, Polymarket AI partnership. Three major developments in one week

buyReasons.title: -31% from 52-Week High
buyReasons.rationale: Fundamentals strongest ever with war expansion, but price compressed by macro. Gap between fundamentals and price

buyReasons.title: Institutional Buying Continues
buyReasons.rationale: Czech National Bank, Spire Wealth Management consistently adding positions

overallOpinion: Houthis fired missiles at Israel, expanding the Iran war. CNBC reports Palantir tools are already in active use, and war expansion increases defense AI demand. Golden Dome missile defense urgency is heightened by the Houthi attacks

Motley Fool called it a 'blockbuster week' while simultaneously publishing '5 years from now, same price.' P/E 250x requires 489% earnings growth to normalize. Even war tailwinds are arguably priced into this multiple
Oil at $100 and inflation concerns are pressuring all high-multiple tech. Despite being a defense beneficiary, P/S 76x means PLTR cannot escape macro selloff pressure
Consensus $199 (+39%). -31% from high. Fundamentals are strongest ever thanks to war expansion, but valuation is the bottleneck. Hold, small DCA positions only

investmentVerdict.summary: Iran war expansion (Houthi entry) strengthens defense AI demand. Palantir tools are battle-tested and Golden Dome urgency is rising. But P/E 250x has already priced in the war premium. Oil at $100 and macro headwinds pressure all high-multiple tech. Small DCA positions only
